answer: Are there different types of hazard assessments? When Alberta’s legislation references hazard assessments, it refers to something called a formal hazard assessment. A formal hazard assessment takes a close look at the overall operations of an organization to identify hazards and develop, implement and monitor related controls. Worker jobs or types of work are broken down into separate tasks.

_meta.query_text: What H2S hazards have been identified and what incidents have occurred?
